scripts.docker:init: docker compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans || true ; bash -lc 'ids=$(docker ps -aq); [ -n "$ids" ] && docker rm -f $ids; docker system prune -a --volumes -f; (docker buildx version >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker buildx prune -a -f || true)'
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose create
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down ; docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:start-dev: npm run docker:stop && docker compose up -d postgres minio redis ttts mailpit caddy
scripts.caddy:hash: docker compose exec caddy caddy hash-password --plaintext
scripts.packages:build: npm run build --workspace packages/markdown && npm run build --workspace packages/track && npm run build --workspace packages/geocoder
scripts.packages:test: npm run test --workspace packages/markdown && npm run test --workspace packages/track && npm run test --workspace packages/geocoder
scripts.packages:fmt: npm run fmt --workspace packages/markdown && npm run fmt --workspace packages/track && npm run fmt --workspace packages/geocoder
scripts.packages:lint: npm run lint --workspace packages/markdown && npm run lint --workspace packages/track && npm run lint --workspace packages/geocoder
scripts.packages:clean: npm run clean --workspace packages/markdown && npm run clean --workspace packages/track && npm run clean --workspace packages/geocoder
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces && rm -rf node_modules dist && find . -name '*~' -type f -delete
scripts.reinstall: rm -f package-lock.json && npm run clean && npm cache clean --force && npm install
scripts.vps:hybrid:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml stop postgres minio redis ttts mailpit caddy || true ; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml rm -f postgres minio redis ttts mailpit caddy ; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml up -d --build --no-deps worker backend frontend
scripts.vps:hybrid:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml stop worker backend frontend ; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml rm -f worker backend frontend
scripts.vps:docker:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml down --rmi all --remove-orphans && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 COMPOSE_DOCKER_CLI_BUILD=1 docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.vps.yml create
